results.name: 1 hub merges meta+video by scene key, unions performers/tags, prefers catalogue cover
1b facetsOf aggregates the tag space with counts, hottest first
2 sealScene is deterministic + self-verifying (L5); tamper fails verify
3 metadata-only scene refuses to carry a video κ (index, never redistribute)
4 manufactureScene: video κ = blake3(recipe), segment closure pinned, scene verifies
5 share→open on a FRESH device (origin offline); tamper fails closed
6 collection head seals under the REAL holospace-identity TEE seam; wrong secret fails closed
7 opening a scene is a step-up whose challenge IS the scene κ (payload-bound)
8 discovery: injected key enables StashDB + normalizes; κ-cache dedupes repeat queries
9 covers content-address by κ (Lightspeed): same bytes → stable κ + /.holo src
10 acquire is plan-only (no fetch) and seals the user's graph into the collection
11 each segment carries a blake3/Bao root that matches its bytes (the verified-streaming axis)
12 HOSTLESS peer: receiver streams a segment by κ over a channel, Bao-verified; lying peer refused
13 rights: a metadata-only scene is never served peer-to-peer
14 swarm failover: a dead peer is skipped, an honest peer still delivers
15 share→peer-open: a #k= recipe opens (origin offline) and its graph drives peer streaming
16 importCatalog paginates a provider into many BYTE-FREE index entries (dedup by id)
17 generateDemoCatalog yields a large, varied, byte-free wall (facet-able)
18 ingest queue: a real κ-graph → streamable+owned; no graph → failed (never a fake stream)
19 aggregator: byte-free index entries carry a resolvable _src + a category taxonomy
20 resolve-on-play: an m3u8 → a κ-MediaGraph; seg0 is delivered BEFORE the tail (streaming ingest)
21 κ-cache replay: a prior resolve's κs serve a repeat from cache, byte-identical, no re-fetch
22 routing: classifyMedia recognizes a watch page (yt-dlp path) but not an m3u8 (HLS path); vstream key is the page URL
23 persistent κ-cache (content-addressed store contract): a repeat view serves a segment by κ even when the resolver THROWS
24 owned-only peer gate refuses a RESOLVED third-party scene (resolved bytes never broadcast)
25 live backend: stashBackend pages byte-free index entries that forward a resolvable _src; importCatalog dedups
26 aloha taxonomy: parseTaxonomy reads /top/<slug> categories (byte-free); slug→query maps underscores
27 fetchTaxonomy + orderForWall: injected fetch → categories with query; a headline category leads
28 Eporner base-36 hash IS the stream-auth transform (raw hash is rejected; transform unlocks it)
29 private curator: watch history re-ranks categories (recency-weighted); byte-free; no-history falls back
30 intent browse: a free-text mood → the overlapping Atlas categories (MOOD synonyms; empty → none)
